pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh which generates this XML file dynamically.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh and task.json instructions.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh showing UID 12 is 'Project Completion', a milestone (Milestone=1).
Code analysis of setup_task.sh XML generation where UID 10 ('Landscaping') and UID 11 ('Security System Install') are explicitly marked as dangling tasks lacking successors.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh XML generation where UID 12 ('Project Completion') initially only has UID 9 ('Flooring') as its predecessor.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic XML project schedule generated by setup_task.sh. The input file is located at /home/ga/Projects/renovation_project.xml and the expected output file is /home/ga/Projects/renovation_fixed.xml. The target milestone, 'Project Completion', corresponds to UID 12. The two dangling tasks without successors are correctly identified as UID 10 ('Landscaping') and UID 11 ('Security System Install'). Before the task modification, the sole predecessor of the completion milestone is verified to be UID 9 ('Flooring').
